name: Sweet Milk Waffles II
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour and measure it out.
2. Beat the egg yolks until light and foamy.
3. Add sugar and melted shortening to the yolks, mixing well.
4. Gradually add milk to the egg mixture while alternating with flour, stirring continuously.
5. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
6. Cook the batter in a hot waffle iron.
7. Yield: 6 servings.
